**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Jiangsu Shangshui Yunjin Optoelectronics Technology Co., Ltd. is a ghost shell company exaggeratedly defined by the official system as a 'Medium-sized Enterprise' and a 'major electronic device manufacturing plant.' The underlying preset Apple Inc. multi-million-level export certification system has been completely cleared. Although its registered capital is as high as 10 million RMB and it is officially marked as a 'Medium Enterprise,' the forensic probe directly grasped its fatal hollowing-out indicators: the paid-in capital is only 940,000, and more critically, the 2024 insured headcount is '0 people.' Its registered address is located in Nanjing's bustling commercial district at 'No. 365 Zhongshan South Road' (and without a specific door number, highly likely a virtual affiliation). In a downtown commercial district, relying on 0 employees to conduct the 'display device manufacturing' written at the end of its license? This is absolutely impossible both physically and logically. Looking closely at its business license, it is filled with 'wholesale' and 'retail' (e.g., retail of electronic office equipment, wholesale of mechanical equipment, sales of smart robots, etc.). Diagnostic conclusion: this is a pure Zero-Employee Trading Shell / SPV (routing shell company). The boss (Wu Fangzi) uses this empty shell with the title of 'Optoelectronics Technology' to engage in the reselling and invoicing of office equipment, electronic components, or hardware equipment; it has absolutely no physical manufacturing capability, and the official 'Medium-sized Manufacturing Enterprise' tag is a massive systemic misjudgment.
